title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Turning Point
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Spandam, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Spandam, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the keys to robin’s rescue: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Plaze in front of the courthouse

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No doubt; he's Kumadori- San from "CPP9"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!!! You "Woman of Sinful Exis- Tence"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Pull her hair if neces- sary!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: After crossing half of the bridge's length,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And once the gates are closed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!!! What was the voice just now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: And take nice Robin with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It doesn't look like steel this time.

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Spandam, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the keys to robin’s rescue: turning point.
